text: Star flow - fires a beam attack at an entity.
Meteorite - fires a powerful meteorite that does good damage to an entity.
Black hole - creates a black hole that attracts all entities (black hole disappears over time).
$(o)Condition:$() Under open sky or in the End.
Supernova: 10% chance to deal 110% damage and apply "Blindness" for 5 sec.
Stellar Cycle: In 3-sec attack combos, every 3rd hit deals +25% damage and applies "Weakness III" for 15 sec.
